description: §38.13 — a canonical valid `<channel watches=orders>` over a Postgres-declared `<schema>` table with an id PK and an exhaustive 3-arm `<onchange>` fires NONE of the §38.13 diagnostics. The compile-shape proof that the synthesized RowChange (Inserted/Updated/Deleted) is recognized, its arms type-check, exhaustiveness passes, and placement is valid — client-observable without a live Postgres.
rationale: §38.13: a valid `watches=` feed on the postgres driver, over a `<schema>`-declared table with a derivable PK, consumed by an exhaustive `<onchange>`, is well-formed — none of the six §38.13.8 codes, E-MATCH-NOT-EXHAUSTIVE, or E-STRUCTURAL-ELEMENT-MISPLACED fire.
